lessons.error: In the discussion of the study, the Greek text inaccurately translates "could affect clinical parameters and inflammatory markers" as "βελτιώνει τους φλεγμονώδεις δείκτες". This is incorrect for two reasons: 1) It changes "affect" (επηρεάζει) to "improves" (βελτιώνει), misrepresenting the exploratory nature of the research question. 2) It entirely omits the crucial term "clinical parameters" (κλινικές παράμετροι).
lessons.rule: Do not repeat error: In the discussion of the study, the Greek text inaccurately translates "could affect clinical parameters and inflammatory markers" as "βελτιώνει τους φλεγμονώδεις δείκτες". lessons.error: The phrase 'evolving development' was translated as 'εξελισσόμενη εξέλιξη'. This is a pleonasm (tautology) in Greek because both words share the same root. It should be revised to 'συνεχή εξέλιξη' (continuous development) or simply 'εξέλιξη' to sound natural and professional.
